sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμπληρόω

- Transliteration: Sumpleroo

- Phonetic: soom-play-ro'-o

- Definition:

1. to fill completely

a. of the hold of a ship

2. to complete entirely, be fulfilled: of time

- Origin: from G4862 and G4137

- TDNT entry: 11:08,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G4137; to implenish completely that is (of space) to swamp (a boat) or (of time) to accomplish (passively be complete): - (fully) come fill up.
